SAFFET SANCAKLI (Kocaeli) - Thank you.
Mr. President, my dear fellow MPs; I greet you all with respect. Dear Minister, Deputy Ministers and valuable staff of the Ministry; Welcome all. Good luck with our budget.
We have to build the future of the Turkish nation through sports and by reaping the social benefits of sports. It was their social structure that gave this trait to our ancestors, who have been described as "conquerors" in history. Our nation, which started riding on the back of yearling sheep when it was 3-4 years old, wrestled with its peers at every opportunity, drew a bow, wielded a sword, played chavgen on horseback, and played kokbörü since its youth, has gained the title of "conqueror" thanks to this tradition. As has been the case throughout history, today sports is a field to which all prosperous nations attach great importance and reap the benefits. I hope we will reach the Turkish Century by giving the necessary importance to sports and reaping the harvest of this importance. On this occasion, I hope that our Commission discussions will be beneficial.
Of course, when we say "sports", sports is always a phenomenon that is above politics and brings friendship, peace and brotherhood to the world; This continued in the same way all over the world.
Of course, what are the benefits of this sport? Let me tell you a little about them, and then I will make a few suggestions, especially about one or two projects. Scientific studies show that sports not only keeps people's body strong and healthy, but also helps them develop their social skills.
contributes. This development is especially observed in young people of educational age. Our children who are interested in sports can quickly improve their physical skills and thus have a much more beautiful appearance and a healthier body. By improving their social skills, they can grow up to be more harmonious in society and, as a result, happier individuals. In particular, our young people who focus on team sports learn in the best way to respect their teammates and even their opponents, even when the pulse is at its highest, and that they are also right and should respect them. Moreover, our children can gain the determination to work hard for their country by strengthening their sense of belonging first to their teammates, then to the classes where these teams are located, to their schools and finally to their nation. The best way to teach cooperation for success, not being selfish, and listening to each other is sports, and for this reason, sports games are taken very seriously by our educators in primary education. Giving importance to sports means taking the most effective measures to protect our youth from bad habits, which are the biggest threat to the future of the Turkish nation. Because, the more our young people turn to sports activities, the more friends they make, the friendship bonds they establish are built on stronger foundations, and the possibility of our young people inclining towards bad habits decreases to the same extent.
In summary, giving importance to sports, directing our youth to sports means saving generations. I repeat this last sentence again; In summary, giving importance to sports, directing our youth to sports means saving generations.

Of course, I would like to give one or two examples from history, as most of us know, while sports - I just said - bring peace, brotherhood and friendship. In 1969, there was a civil war in Nigeria. Of course, then one of the most important players in the world, Pele, plays for Santos, Brazil's Santos team; Santos is also on a world tour and they will play a match in Nigeria, in Benin City, they will play a match with a local team there, but there is a civil war in Nigeria, the war has started. The groups in the civil war gather and say: "Pele is coming. Let's take a break from the war for a few days." And they agree among themselves, everyone comes to watch Pele, the war continues after Pele leaves. In a country - an irrelevant country, Brazil or Nigeria - the men stop the civil war because Pele is coming.
The second example is that recently there was a player called "Drogba" in Galatasaray, we all know him, he was a world-class player. Similarly, in 2006 - this Drogba from the Ivory Coast - a civil war begins in Ivory Coast, and after a match in the 2006 World Cup, he says on television: "I want this civil war to end, I want peace to come." And they live in that country and say: "If Drogba said this, we will stop the civil war." He is also among the 100 most influential people in the world in TIME magazine. In other words, the power of sports. Many things and hostilities that cannot be finished even if you hold a million negotiations or do other things can be ended through sports. That's why we need to think about sports a little more beyond politics.
Of course, you need to be healthy to do sports, and you need to do sports to be healthy. So why am I saying this? Unfortunately, sports culture is not developed enough in our country. If we do not develop this sports culture, we will continue to be an unhealthy society. I have some data in front of me, you surely know it, but let me tell you a little about it anyway. There are many problems in Türkiye. Of course, we count this, especially drugs and bad habits related to sports and young people, but one of the problems of Türkiye is obesity, not only for young people but for all of us; We are 1st in Europe in obesity. Currently, the data in front of me has increased compared to two or three years ago, I follow it because it is constantly. According to a study conducted in 2024, 32.1 percent of the population aged 15 and over is obese and 34.6 percent is overweight. These rates vary according to gender, age, education, income, region and rural-urban distinction. So I guess there are 100 people in this hall, so 32 of us are obese and 34 of us are overweight anyway, there is nothing left, 66, 67; 33 percent remains, friends, Türkiye is facing a great danger. In a speech I gave years ago, these rates
Obesity was 31 percent - that is, three or four years ago - it has increased to 32.1 percent. So, if it increases by 1 point every three or four years, it means that in twenty or thirty years, 50 percent of Türkiye will be obese and 90 percent will be overweight, and there will be no healthy people left.

Of course, I have an analysis of these obesity rates; 39.9 percent in women; 24.4 percent in men; It is slightly less in rural areas and more in urban areas. As a region, the Eastern Anatolia Region is the highest with 38.5 percent and the Black Sea Region is the lowest with 25.9 percent. Dear Minister, there is a low level in your region, I guess they do sports because the terrain is constantly rugged.
Therefore, there are two reasons why there is obesity in Türkiye, why we are obese and overweight. One is our eating habits and the other is our lack of sports culture. Let me read quickly about eating habits, I wrote it briefly there. Of course, we have a rich and delicious cuisine, but we also eat fatty, sugary, salty and high-calorie foods; Foods such as cheese, olives, eggs, honey, jam and bread for breakfast; meat, rice, pasta, pastry, soup for lunch and dinner; Pastries, pastries and cakes for snacks from time to time. Of course, if we eat all of these, we are automatically heading towards overweight and obesity, no matter what you do.
NURTEN YONTAR (Tekirdağ) - There is no indoor gym, the old gyms were demolished, there is no indoor gym.
AYYÜCE TÜRKEŞ TAŞ (Adana) - I don't know if there is anyone who eats what you mentioned.
SAFFET SANCAKLI (Kocaeli) - How?
AYYÜCE TÜRKEŞ TAŞ (Adana) - Those you mentioned are probably at least 2 thousand TL per person. While practicing dry bread…
SAFFET SANCAKLI (Kocaeli) - I mean, of course, Türkiye is a country of 85 million people, I am speaking in general terms.
AYYÜCE TÜRKEŞ TAŞ (Adana) - 95 percent cannot eat.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - They are distributed free of charge to students in libraries.
AYYÜCE TÜRKEŞ TAŞ (Adana) - What is being done?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - It is distributed free of charge in libraries.
SAFFET SANCAKLI (Kocaeli) - Dear Minister, Dear President, I swear to God...
CHAIRMAN MEHMET MUŞ - Dear friends, due to these taunts, the Republican People's Party will go to the Group, I have to take a break, we are delaying it like this; Please.
SAFFET SANCAKLI (Kocaeli) - Secondly, friends, inactivity. Turkish people generally lead a sedentary life. In daily life, physical activities such as walking, cycling and stairs are rarely done. In business life, he works sitting at a desk, in front of a computer, as if driving a vehicle; In his spare time, he spends time with screens such as television, computer and phone; The habit of doing sports and exercising is also low. This reduces calorie expenditure in the body and causes fat accumulation. I will explain the solution to this in a moment, but I will share with you the project developed by the Nationalist Movement Party. The psychology of obesity and overweight is very important, that is, its psychological effects are so important. We all know that especially when it is a psychological problem, it can cause both psychological and social problems. Obesity can cause psychological problems such as depression, anxiety, lack of self-confidence, eating disorders, sleep disorders, and sexual dysfunctions. It can also cause social problems such as obesity, discrimination, exclusion, abuse and bullying. These problems can be both the cause and the result of obesity.

Obese people often use eating as a coping mechanism, eating provides them with temporary relief, happiness and satisfaction. However, this increases weight gain and obesity, which worsens psychological and social problems. This vicious cycle causes obesity to become a chronic disease and it is impossible to get rid of it.
Now, how do we solve this obesity and this overweight? Dear Minister, let me give you some criticism in general.
Now, of course, we go all over the world, how are children taught this sport in the developed countries of the world, how is it started at a young age, how is this sports culture formed? For example, let's say I'm doing sports right now, but my aunt doesn't do it, neither does my aunt, and neither does my uncle's son. One does it, 8 people don't, one does, 15 people don't. This comes from the lack of a sports culture, that is, everyone is trying to do something individually, and when that happens, of course, there will be a lot of problems in a country of 85 million people.
Now, one of my criticisms is this, Mr. Minister: How much sports do our children do in primary, secondary and high school? Of course, I got this from the websites, so if there is anything wrong, please correct it, Mr. Minister.
In primary schools, it is carried out by the classroom teacher under the name of "sports, games and physical activities" for five hours a week in the 1st and 2nd grades. We all went to school, of course classroom teachers have some knowledge about sports, but I don't think he is an expert at all, classroom teachers have different expertise. In the 3rd and 4th grades, it is done for two hours under the name of "sports, games and physical activities" with the classroom teacher and a coach from the Youth and Sports Directorate. In middle and high school, it is done for two hours by the physical education teacher. Yes, the physical education teacher comes, but he works out for two hours a week, that is, if we multiply 24 times 7, he does one hundred and sixty-eight hours. Among these hours, children in middle school and high school do sports for two hours.
Of course, how will we solve this? As the Nationalist Movement Party, we have been working on this issue for many years. I had previously shared this with my Minister and explained this in the Parliament. Think of a child starting primary school at the age of 6; The most suitable sport for this child is determined according to his/her physical structure, his/her own weight, and the sporting history of his/her family. Of course, this is determined by experts. We also give the same child an artistic activity, that is, he can play an instrument, play theatre, make movies, do folklore; As a result, we also impose an artistic activity on this child and at least four to six hours of sports a week and four to six hours of artistic activity a week, which means approximately one hour of sports and one hour of artistic activity every day during the week. If I'm not mistaken, children now go to school in the morning and leave school in the afternoon, so there are seven or eight hours of lessons every day. What will happen to these children if we make them do sports and art for two hours in this eight-hour lesson?

These children started at the age of 6, imagine a child who has done sports and arts for twelve years when he turns 18. Of course, while they do these sports and arts during the week, there will be inter-school competitions on the weekends. This means that these children will not do sports during the week and go and sleep at home on the weekend. Imagine a youth who does sports and arts seven days a week by holding competitions between schools on the sports and artistic activities they do on the weekends and having the children compete to motivate them a little; A youth who did sports and arts for twelve years, from the age of 6 to 18. Moreover, he got into university and went to university for five years; He turned 23 and graduated from university. A child has been doing sports and arts for seventeen years out of twenty-three. Well, will a young person who has done sports and arts for seventeen years out of twenty-three years of his life do sports in the next life? He will definitely do it because his body will want it, he will do it even if he doesn't want it, that is, he will not be able to sleep, he will not feel well, he will definitely do sports. What is the 2nd largest budget of the Republic of Türkiye - I just asked my esteemed President? Ministry of Health budget. In Türkiye - we are traveling around the world - there are quality hospitals that are not available in the world, but no matter which hospital you go to, there are just as many queues. What does this reveal? So, as Turkish society, we are a sick society. Summer or winter; It's summer, other diseases; It's winter, other diseases. Whenever we go to the hospital - we also get the flu from time to time, something happens - there are queues everywhere. This means that we, as a society, are a sick society. We spend so much money on medicine, doctors and hospitals, the 2nd largest budget of Türkiye's budget is spent there. There is no need to initiate this project and attribute it to any political party or anything; This is above politics. We need to address obesity and the lack of sports culture, which are among the biggest bleeding wounds and biggest problems of Turkish society. How will we do this? Now, the man who has been doing sports for twenty-three years and the man who has been doing sports for eighteen years will continue to do sports throughout his life. As a society that does so many sports, we can transform Turkish society in twenty years; We can raise a young generation that does different sports, does art, stays away from bad habits, has a strong mind and a strong body, as Atatürk said, that is, we can transform Turkey and create that team, that group life.
He will also do sports throughout. So, will a society that does sports throughout its life and naturally eats accordingly need so many hospitals and so many medicines? Maybe even half will be enough. Well, if you bring that half-budget back to the Ministry of National Education and Sports... The esteemed MP just criticized "Your budget is small." Then we will increase it with such things. In other words, if 10 lira goes to the Ministry of Health, 5 lira will go, and when those 5 lira are transferred back to the Ministry of National Education and the Ministry of Youth and Sports, Turkish youth and Turkish sports will go to completely different places. We can hold our daily fights here now, I have a lot of things to criticize too.

Mr. Minister is also here, one on one, I go to drink tea from time to time, we bump into each other, I swear he puts up with me quite a bit, I mean, I say everything, "This is missing, it should be like this." saying. But that's normal, we live in a country of 85 million people. What we need to do as the Parliament is to make a total program.
So, what will happen to all these men then? Health, art is okay. Well, where millions of young people - as far as I know, 19 million of them are primary school students - are engaged in sports and arts, and do sports every day, will we ever need to look for players from anywhere for the National Team again? Those who do normal sports will do it, the very talented ones will stand out and be eliminated from there anyway, they will be seen; We will move them towards national teams in whatever branch they are in and choose a National Team athlete from among millions of people. Of course, where will we get all this training? Dear Minister, I looked at the fact that there are approximately 70 thousand people who are BESYO graduates and BESYO graduates who are not currently working. I don't know if the number is correct, but they said 70-80 thousand people; Let it be 60 thousand, let it be 50 thousand. These friends graduated from these sports faculties. Do you know why they finished it? These are experts, so they graduated from BESYOs and physical education schools in order to help us do sports and educate the youth. Well, these kids are idle right now. Now, that's why our staff is ready, Mr. Minister, these BESYO graduates have received training. We have serious resources to implement this project. Of course, other than that, we are ready to work and help with this project whenever you ask, and we will never hold back.
We passed the Sports Law published in the Official Gazette on 22/4/2022, most of the friends here were already there. This law was passed, they say: "Well, you passed the law, but this law has not been of any use yet, we haven't seen anything." they say. Now, this law has begun to bear fruit. One of them is this: As you know, elections are held in all federations in all branches during the Olympic years. Dear Minister, as you know, in that law, we stipulated in the law two years ago that there should be at least two nationally qualified athletes in that branch among the 11-person board of directors membership.
(The microphone was automatically turned off by the device)
PRESIDENT MEHMET MUŞ - Mr. Sancaklı, I am giving you additional time, please get it together.
SAFFET SANCAKLI (Kocaeli) - I am finishing.
Currently, all of them are two national athletes, so at least 2 of the 11 people can put 5-10 if they want. We always complained, "Sports should be managed by those inside the sport, those outside the sport are always managed by those outside the sport, what is this?" While criticisms have been made, that article has now come into force in the elections held this year, which is an important issue for Turkish sports.
Secondly, it is always talked about, "Those who come from the illegitimate world and earn money in different ways enter sports and purify themselves." Here, you see, the man has a lot of criminal records, he is a sports manager. We included an article in that law as follows: People who have committed a crime and been sentenced to at least one year will not be able to manage any sports branch or any club throughout their lives. While I was explaining this, I even said, "Operation Clean Hands has started." I said in the Parliament.

It started right now. In none of the new congresses did we ensure that those people who committed this crime and were punished - of course, there are heinous crimes, as well as normal crimes - stay away from sports.
Finally, Mr. Minister, the most important issue for us was this: Clubs spend a lot of money, the president and the board of directors are in charge of club
There was no law. In my opinion, one of the most important articles in this law is that we have introduced personal responsibility, and that is: The previous management came, how much was the income of the previous club X? 100 lira. He can increase his spending this year by 10 percent, that is, he can spend 110 liras. The club president and managers say: "We will be champions, the fans want it. We will spend 150 liras." Go ahead and spend it. They spend 150 liras and pay 40 liras out of pocket.
(The microphone was automatically turned off by the device)
MAYOR MEHMET MUŞ - Mr. Sancaklı, please tidy up.
SAFFET SANCAKLI (Kocaeli) - I am finishing.
Now, we introduced this law and that. Right now, Mr. Minister, unfortunately, clubs have been spending a lot of money for one and a half or two years. This is my request from you - I know, you created those commissions, you created those teams - let's inspect the clubs as soon as possible, because the numbers I read, the transfers made for 20 million euros, 30 million euros, 40 million euros, do not reflect the quality of the Turkish league. The last Fenerbahçe-Trabzon match was played, one hundred sixteen minutes, the playing time was forty-one minutes. So, you still can't do these things, but money continues to be spent. I request you to start monitoring these friends as soon as possible so that they can see the power of the state.
I wish you good luck.
Thank you, Mr. President, for giving us additional time.

SAFFET SANCAKLI (Kocaeli) - Teşekkür ediyorum Sayın Başkanım.
Sayın Başkanım, Sayın Bakanım, değerli milletvekilleri ve değerli Bakanlık bürokratları, sayın basın mensupları; hepinizi saygıyla selamlıyorum. 2026 yılı Gençlik ve Spor Bakanlığı bütçesinin hayırlı olmasını diliyorum. Sayın Bakanım ve değerli bürokratlar hoş geldiniz.
Konuşmama Türkiye Cumhuriyeti'nin kurucusu Gazi Mustafa Kemal Atatürk'ün gençlikle ilgili söylemiş olduğu birkaç cümleyle başlamak istiyorum: "Bütün ümidim gençliktedir." diyen Atatürk nutuklarında sık sık "Ey Türk istikbalinin evladı! Yeni Türkiye'nin genç evlatları!" sözleriyle hitapta bulunmuştur. Özellikle Türk istiklalini ve cumhuriyetini "Ey Türk gençliği!" hitabıyla gençlere emanet etmiş ve gençliğin önemini vurgulamıştır. Atatürk gençliğe duyduğu bu sarsılmaz inancı onların eğitimine verdiği önemle de göstermiştir. Ona göre, gençlerin sağlam bir karaktere sahip olmalarının temelinde eğitim vardır. Bu nedenle, gençlik, millî şuura sahip ve çağdaş düşünce anlayışıyla yetişmiş bireylerden oluşmalıdır. Gençler, almakta oldukları eğitimin kazanımlarıyla, insanlığın, vatan sevgisinin ve fikir hürriyetinin en kıymetli sembolü olacaklardır. Cumhuriyet ancak aklın, bilimin, sporun ve ilerlemenin ışığında yükselen, düşünen, sorgulayan, üreten ve değerlerine sahip çıkan gençlerle yaşayacaktır. Bu amaçla Anayasa'mızda 2 tane madde vardır, bunları da sizinle paylaşmak istiyorum:
Madde 58'de diyor ki "Devlet, istiklâl ve Cumhuriyetimizin emanet edildiği gençlerin müsbet ilmin ışığında, Atatürk ilke ve inkılâpları doğrultusunda ve Devletin ülkesi ve milletiyle bölünmez bütünlüğünü ortadan kaldırmayı amaç edinen görüşlere karşı yetişme ve gelişmelerini sağlayıcı tedbirleri alır. Devlet, gençleri alkol düşkünlüğünden, uyuşturucu maddelerden, suçluluk, kumar ve benzeri kötü alışkanlıklardan ve cehaletten korumak için gerekli tedbirleri alır."
Madde 59 "Devlet, her yaştaki Türk vatandaşlarının beden ve ruh sağlığını geliştirecek tedbirleri alır, sporun kitlelere yayılmasını teşvik eder. Devlet başarılı sporcuyu korur." şeklindedir.
Tabii, şimdi Türkiye çok genç nüfusa sahip. Sadece ilköğretimde bile 20 milyon civarında evladımız var, genç bir ülkeyiz. Bu kadar genç bir ülkede, bu kadar nüfusu 90 milyona yaklaşan bir ülkede tabii ki sorunlar olacak ama benim özellikle vurgulamak istediğim 2 tane problem var ki bunların bir tanesi madde bağımlılığı, bir tanesi de internet bağımlığı.
Bu madde bağımlılığıyla ilgili doğdukları gün yürümeyi öğrendiği zaman ilk kelimelerini söylediğinde bizlere tarifsiz mutluluklar yaşatan çocuklarımız, onlar büyüdükçe hayatın onlara sunduğu olumlu veya olumsuz unsurlarla yüz yüze kalmaya başlıyorlar. Bu unsurlarla baş etme potansiyellerine göre de birçok sorun yaşayabiliyorlar. Günümüzde onları bekleyen en büyük tehlikelerden biri de madde bağımlılığı. Son yıllarda uyuşturucu maddelerin kolay ulaşılabilir olması, yeni formların üretilmesi, fiyatlarının ucuzlatılması birçok kişinin bağımlı hâle gelmesine neden olmuştur. Özellikle lise ve üniversite çağındaki gençlerimiz ciddi bir tehlike altındadır. Sıklıkla maddeyle tanıştıkları bu dönem onlar için hayatlarında bir dönüm noktası olmaktadır. Ev partilerinde, gece kulüplerinde, sokak aralarında bu maddelerle tanışıp dramatik bir yolculuğa başlamaktadırlar. Bu maddeyi hızla birbirlerine bulaştırıp çevrelerinde bir halka oluşturabiliyorlar. "Madde arkadaşlığı" dediğimiz bu durum, bağımlılığın artık bir parçası olmuş, başlangıçta alınan keyif yerine daha sonra maddeye ulaşım sorunları gibi ortak kaygılara bırakıp gençlerimizi batağa sürüklemiştir.
İkinci konu da bu internet bağımlılığıdır. İnternet bağımlılığı kişinin bilgisayar, akıllı telefonlar, tabletler veya diğer dijital cihazlar aracılığıyla internete aşırı ve kontrolsüz bir şekilde bağımlı hâle gelmesini ifade eder. Bu bağımlılık genellikle çevrim içi oyunlar, sosyal medya, çevrim içi alışveriş, video izleme veya diğer çevrim içi aktivitelerle aşırı zaman harcamalarıyla belirginleşir. İnternet bağımlılığı kişinin iş, okul, ilişkiler ve önemli faaliyetleri ihmal etmesine, fiziksel olarak sorunlara yol açmasına ve genel yaşam kalitesinin olumsuz etkilenmesine neden olabilir. Bu durum genellikle psikolojik, sosyal ve çevresel faktörlerin birleşimiyle ortaya çıkar ve profesyonel yardım gerektirir. İnternet bağımlığına sebep olan faktörler psikolojik, sosyal, çevresel, biyolojik, kişilik özellikleri, aile dinamikleri ve kültürel faktörler arasında ana olarak söyleyebiliriz. İnternet bağımlılığı özellikle çocuklar ve ergenler arasında giderek daha da yaygın hâle gelmektedir. Bu yaş grubundaki bağımlılık çeşitli çevrim içi aktivitelerle aşırı derecede zaman geçirme ve diğer yaşamsal aktiviteleri ihmal etme eğilimi olarak da görülmektedir. Tabii, gençlerimizin birçok sorunu var ama özellikle bu uyuşturucu, alkol ve madde bağımlılığı dediğimiz, üstüne son yıllarda herkesin ortak fikirde buluştuğu internet bağımlılığı da inanılmaz derecede büyük bir problemdir, zaten birazdan da biraz değineceğim bu konulara. Bunları çözmemizin birinci ana aktörü spordur. Biz nasıl spor yapacağız? Spor kültürünü nasıl oluşturacağız ülkemizde? Bu çocuklarımıza küçük yaşta nasıl spor yaptıracağız? Şimdi, onunla ilgili, biraz size anlatmak istiyorum.
Değerli milletvekilleri, Milliyetçi Hareket Partisi olarak vizyonumuzu ve fikrimizi size biraz anlatmak istiyorum. Sporda başarı kadar sevgi, ahlak, disiplin, azim ve gayret gibi erdemlerle toplumsal kaynaşmaya katkının ön plana çıkarılması, her alanda sporcu yetiştirmek için gerekli fiziki, teknolojik ve insan gücü altyapısının tesis edilmesi, çocuklarımızı ve gençlerimizi her türlü zararlı alışkanlıklardan uzak tutarak erdemli, bedenen ve ruhen sağlıklı bir nesil olarak yetişmelerine katkı sağlamak, spor yapma imkânlarını artırarak spora yönlendirmek suretiyle çocuklarımızı teknolojik oyun ve eğlencelere bağımlılıktan kurtarmak, sosyal ilişkilerini geliştirmek ve sporcu kaynağı oluşturmak millî spor politikamızın esasını oluşturmaktadır. Milliyetçi Hareket Partisi olarak yıllar önce bir "Vizyon Proje" adı altında bir hazırlığımız oldu ve ben bunu bir iki defa daha paylaştım; bu konu da şudur -Sayın Bakanımıza ben bu konudan bahsetmiştim zaten, haberi var- bir kez daha burada huzurunuzda kısa bir özet geçmek istiyorum: Şimdi, biz ülkemizde maalesef ve maalesef hasta bir toplumuz. Yani bugün çok üst düzey, belki de dünyanın en iyi hastanelerine sahibiz, sayı olarak da çok ciddi hastanelerimiz var, doktorlarımız var, üniversitelerden yetişen doktorlarımız var fakat hangi hastaneye giderseniz de kuyruk var. Yani genel olarak biz hasta bir toplumumuz arkadaşlar.
Daha önce de Genel Kurul Salonu'nda obeziteyi anlattım ama maalesef, millet konuyu başka tarafa götürdü. Türkiye'nin yüzde 32'si obez, yüzde 31,5'i de aşırı kilolu yani her 3 kişiden 2 kişi Türkiye'de ya aşırı kilolu, ya obez; bu da bizi hastalıklara götürüyor. Bunun da ana nedeni tabii ki beslenme -o benim alanım değil- ama bizim spor kültürümüz yok. Biz çocuklarımıza çocuk yaşta eğer spor kültürünü aşılarsak hayatları boyunca da spora devam ederler. Yani ben geçmişte profesyonel spor yaptım, dizimden ameliyat oldum, birkaç ay yürüyüş yapamadım, kendimi kötü hissediyorum, daha yeni yeni başladım yürümeye. Bu spor öyle bir şey ki başladığınız zaman hayat boyu gidiyor.
Bizim projemiz şu: İlkokulda 6 yaşında okula başlayan bir çocuğumuzu fizik yapısına göre, aile yapısına göre, isteğine göre bir spor branşına yönlendiriyoruz; aynı şekilde, aynı çocuğumuza da bir sanatsal branş veriyoruz yani bir enstrüman çalabilir, tiyatro oynayabilir, sinema yapabilir veya başka bir şey. Tabii, şu anda, maalesef, beden eğitimi derslerimizin sayısı az. Bunu artırarak haftada beş gün beden eğitimi, spor yapacaklar, beş gün de sanatsal etkinlik yapacaklar yani haftada minimum on saat. Hafta sonu da okullar arasında bu öğrencilerimiz yarışacaklar. İlköğretim bittiğinde, on iki sene sonra bu çocuğumuz 18 yaşına geldiğinde on iki yıl spor ve sanat yapmış olacak. Dört sene de üniversiteyi koyduğumuzda yani 22-23 yaşına gelen bir çocuğumuz on sekiz sene
spor ve sanat yapmış olacak. Tabii, bu kültürü alan çocuk bundan sonraki hayatında da spor yapacak mı? Tabii ki yapacak çünkü vücudu isteyecek onu. Peki, bu kadar spor ve sanatla yetişen, Atatürk'ün dediği gibi sağlam kafanın sağlam vücutta olduğu gençleri yetiştirirsek bizim bu kadar hastalanma ihtimalimiz zaten ortadan kalkacak. Bildiğim kadarıyla Sağlık Bakanlığına Türkiye'nin 2'nci en büyük bütçesi harcanıyor. O zaman bu kadar bütçe de harcanmayacak, bu kadar hastaneye de ihtiyaç olmayacak, bu kadar ilaca da ihtiyaç olmayacak. O aradaki kalan bütçeyi tekrardan millî eğitime ve spora aktardığımızda yirmi senede bambaşka yeni bir jenerasyon yaratmış olacağız ülkede. Bu projeyi ben daha önce de dile getirmiştim, Sayın Bakanımızı da hazır burada yakalamışken, sizleri de burada bulmuşken bir kez daha bunu anlatıyorum; bu, bilinmeyen bir konu değil ama tabii, Millî Eğitim Bakanlığı, Spor Bakanlığı ve belki de başka bakanlıkları da içine katarak, Sağlık Bakanlığını da içine katarak, böyle bir proje yaparak yirmi sene içerisinde Türkiye'de yeni bir jenerasyon, spor ve sanat yapan, sağlam kafa ve sağlam vücutlu bir jenerasyon yaratabiliriz.
Teşekkür ediyorum.
Şimdi, tabii, biraz da güncel şeylerden bahsetmek istiyorum, burada vaktimi de iyi kullanmak istiyorum. Sporun birçok faydası var tabii, ulusal gurur ve birlik duygusu demişim. Kazandığımız millî maçlardan sonra sokaklara dökülüyoruz. Bu ülke vatanını, bayrağını, ezanını seven insanlardan oluşan bir ülke, bir başarıda herkes sokağa dökülüyor. Tabii, özellikle, kadınlar voleybolumuz ve bokstaki başarılardan sonra kadın sporcuların da morallerinin yükselmesi ve katılması da çok önemli. Genç nesiller için rol modeli oluyor; Arda Güler, Busenaz Sürmeneli, Eda Erdem, Alperen Şengün gibi isimler gençleri özendiriyor ve rol model oluyor. Türkiye'nin uluslararası itibarına ve diplomatik gücüne ciddi katkı sağlıyor, ülke ekonomisine de tabii, ciddi katkıları oldu.
Şimdi, değerli arkadaşlar -biraz grip oldum, kusura bakmayın- gündemdeki bahis ve şike konusuyla ilgili de biraz konuşmak istiyorum. Gerçekten hayretle ve üzüntüyle hepimiz seyrediyoruz bunu. Türk futbolunda bir şeyler biliyorduk, biz de yıllardır bu işin içindeyiz ama bu rakamlar açıklandıktan sonra yani ben şahsım adına söylüyorum, ben bile şok geçirdim.
Şimdi, burada, biraz istatistik paylaşayım yani açıklanan istatistikleri. 1.024 futbolcu bahis oynamış. Türkiye'deki bütün Süper Lig, 1. Lig, 2. Lig, 3. Lig oyuncularının toplamı 3.700 kişi. 3.700 kişinin 1.024'ü kendi adına, kendi vatandaşlık numarasıyla hesap açarak bahis oynamış; 47 kişi daha var, onların akıbeti belli değil araştırılıyor. Süper Lig'den 27 oyuncu, 1. Lig'den 86, 2. Lig'den 282, 3. Lig'den 629 oyuncu açıklandı.
Hakemlerimiz var, yıllardır bu hakemleri ben savundum hep yani bu kulüp başkanları bütün başarısızlıklarını hep hakemlerin üstüne atarak "Hep hakemin yüzünden, hep hakemin yüzünden..." diye yıllarca dinledik ya, ben de bu hakemleri savundum, savunmaz olaydım. 571 hakem var bütün Türkiye'de profesyonel hakem. Bunun 149'u kendi ismiyle bahis oynamış ve Profesyonel Disiplin Kuruluna sevk edilmiş. Arkadaşlar, üçte 1'i neredeyse yani her 3 hakemden 1'i, her 3 futbolcudan 1'i kendi adına bahis oynamış. İşin enteresan tarafı da zekâ seviyesi çok iyi olmayan, çok yetenekli olmayan adamdan futbolcu olmaz arkadaşlar. Hep dalga geçeriz biz "Topa çok kafa vuruyoruz, bizim kafamız çok çalışmıyor." diye, işimize geldiği zaman onu söyleriz ama çok zeki olmayan bir adamın o sahada oynama ihtimali yok ya.
BERİTAN GÜNEŞ ALTIN (Mardin) - Kadın yok herhâlde.
SAFFET SANCAKLI (Kocaeli) - Şu anda açıklananlar içerisinde kadın açıklanmadı. Yok, Allah'tan yok yani bir orada yoksunuz şükür. Şimdi, önümüzdeki günlerde açıklanacak listelerde inşallah çıkmaz da kadın futboluna girildi yani ama bilmiyoruz şimdi. Daha kadınlar açıklanmadı şu an itibarıyla, onlar açıklanmadı, yöneticiler açıklanmadı, teknik direktörler açıklanmadı.
Şimdi, bu adamlar zeki adamlar, hakem olmak için, hükmetmek için de zeki olmak lazım.
Yahu, Federasyon futbolculara diyor ki: "Eğer İddaa oynarsanız üç aydan bir seneye kadar ceza veririm size." Federasyon hakemlere diyor ki: "Hakemliğinizi bitiririm." Bu adamlar gitmişler, kendi TC'leriyle Türkiye'deki resmî bahis sitelerinde bahis oynamışlar.
Şimdi, bazı rakamlar var, teyit ettim de inanmak istemiyorum. 139 profesyonel futbol kulübü var Türkiye'de, 135'indeki oyuncular bahis oynamış, sadece 4 kulüp var bahis oynayanı çıkmayan. 135; 139'un 135'i. Bir hakem -beş yıl geriye gidilmiş ve beş yıllık istatistiklere bakılmış- 18 bin defa İddaa oynamış, 18 bin; beş seneye bölersen, güne vurursan herhâlde her gün böyle bir 10 taneye falan denk geliyor. Daha vahim bir şey var: Bir futbolcu 108 bin defa oynamış yani günde 20 tane falan kupon yapmış, herhâlde, her Allah'ın günü beş senede. Hakem efendi, futbolcu efendi; peki, bu kuponlarla uğraşırken siz ne zaman futbol oynamayı düşündünüz veya adam gibi hakemlik yapmayı düşündünüz, o antrenmanları yaptınız, konsantre oldunuz? Siz bunlardan çoluk çocuğunuza "Merhaba." falan dememişsinizdir. Ne zaman yemek yediniz siz? Şimdi, durum böyle vahim.
Kulüpler var -isim saymayacağım, şey olmasın diye- mesela, ortalama kulüplerde 27-28 oyuncu olur federasyona bildirilen; 27 olması lazım bildiğim kadarıyla. Mesela, bir kulüpte 18 oyuncu, 27'nin 18'i; 2 kulüpte 17, 17 var; bir kulüpte 16 var, 2 kulüpte 15 var ve aşağı doğru gidiyor; 14, 13, 12, 11 falan. Arkadaşlar, maça çıkıyorsun, oyuncuların yüzde 80'i bahis oynamış; biz de seyrediyoruz, bağırıyoruz.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Kendi maçlarıyla mı ilgili?
SAFFET SANCAKLI (Kocaeli) - Şöyle: Araştırılıyor şu anda, onu da söyleyeceğim.
Buyurun Sayın Bakanım, bir şey mi söyleyecektiniz?
GENÇLİK VE SPOR BAKANI OSMAN AŞKIN BAK - Araştırılıyor diyecektim.
SAFFET SANCAKLI (Kocaeli) - Şimdi, şöyle bir durum var -sormuşken sorunuza cevap vereyim eğer istiyorsanız- şimdi iki tane şey var burada: Bir, oyuncu veya hakem bahis oynamış sadece. Bu, Futbol Federasyonunu ilgilendiriyor, üç ay ile bir sene arasında ceza veriyor. Eğer bu oyuncular veya hakemler bahis oynadıkları maçta, maçı etkileyecek... Kendi maçlarına oynadılarsa o zaman cumhuriyet başsavcılığı devreye giriyor, zaten oradan da bir soruşturma yürüyor. O zaman, 6222 giriyor devreye, şikeye giriyor, Türkçe ismi "şike", oraya giriyor ve ondan yargılanıyor. Burada iki tane konu var: Bir normal bahis oynayanlar var, bir de şikeye karışanlar var.
Sayın Bakanım, fakat burada bir şeye daha dikkat etmemiz lazım bu operasyonlar yapılırken: Şimdi, www.nesine.com ve www.misli.com var, bunlar resmî bahis siteleri; ikinci ve üçüncü liglerin yayın hakları belli bir para karşılığında, kulüplere gelir gelsin diye bunlara verildi Futbol Federasyonu tarafından. Bunlar da şöyle bir kural koymuşlar: "Resmî üye olman için vatandaşlık numarasını vermen lazım." Tamam, vatandaşlık numarasını veriyorsun, oradan maçları izleyebiliyorsun. Zaten belli hakemler ve belli oyuncular sadece maç izlemek için oraya kaydolmuşlar. Ama onlar da uyanık, bizi teşvik edecekler ya bahse, bir "bonus" açıyorlar sana, 40 lira ve 50 lira; ancak bunu oynarsan senin şifren açılıyor ve maçları seyredebiliyorsun. Bir de böyle yapanlar var yani sadece maç izlemek için girmiş, o "bonus"u mecburen kullanmış ve bir daha hayatında oynamamış. Onun için, bu, o kadar hassas bir konu ki... Burada hem Federasyonun hem savcılığın bu operasyonu yaparken çok dikkat etmesi lazım, bir kişinin bile arada gitmemesi lazım. Mesela "Zorbay Küçük" diye bir hakem açıklandı -ben de çok şaşırdım, uzaktan da olsa tanıyorum adamı- adam gitti, hemen savcılığa verdi, meğer onun adına açılmış bir yerden ve adam affedildi. Burada çok dikkatli olmamız gerekiyor.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Telefonlara da devamlı gelen bahis mesajları var.
SAFFET SANCAKLI (Kocaeli) - Tabii, tabii.
Şimdi, içinde olan insanların, futbolcusunun, teknik direktörünün, yöneticisinin, hakeminin bahis oynamaları yasak zaten. Bu, ne spor ahlakına uyar ne de genel ahlaka uyar.
Biraz çabuk çabuk geçeyim.
Tabii, arkadaşlar, bu çok büyük bir ayıp. Daha ileri cümle söylemek istemiyorum ama bunları oluşturan da şöyle bir konu var: Bunlar oynamış da, bir de bunları oynatanlar var, esas oyunu kuranlar ve bu işi organize edenler. Bunlar nasıl yapıyor, biliyor musunuz arkadaşlar? Kulüplerimizin, 18 Süper Lig kulübünün aşağı yukarı 100 milyar TL borcu var şu anda, 100 milyar TL. Zaten
üç büyüklerinki açıklandı; 60 milyar TL. Yani, 100 milyar civarında 18 takımın borcu var ve bu kulüplerin birçoğu oyunculara veya teknik direktörlere parasını zamanında ödeyemiyor, bazıları da hiç ödemiyor. Tabii, bu tam da bu oynatanların ve bahis mafyasının işine gelen bir ortam, hemen bunlara yanaşıyorlar ve bunların aklını çeliyorlar. Ha, bunların aklının çelinmesi tamamen karakter zafiyeti yani onun konuşulacak bir tarafı yok.
SEMRA ÇAĞLAR GÖKALP (Bitlis) - Sistem zafiyeti değil de karakter zafiyeti mi?
SAFFET SANCAKLI (Kocaeli) - İkisi de beraber, anlatıyorum. Kulüpler o kadar borçlu ki, o kadar kötü yönetildiler ki buna da çanak tutuyorlar. Bunun için, 26 Nisan 2022'de bir spor yasası çıkardık, bu spor yasasında hem kulüp başkanlarının ve yöneticilerinin kişisel sorumlulukları hem de birçok madde var.
(Mikrofon otomatik cihaz tarafından kapatıldı)
SAFFET SANCAKLI (Kocaeli) - Bitti mi sürem?
BAŞKAN MEHMET MUŞ - Sayın Sancaklı, süreniz doldu, iki dakika ilave süre vereceğim, sonra uzatmayacağım.
Buyurun.
SAFFET SANCAKLI (Kocaeli) - Bu kanun da uygulanmaya, kulüpler denetlenmeye başladı. Göreceksiniz önümüzdeki günlerde başka şeyler de çıkabilecek çünkü bu kulüpleri adam gibi yöneteceksiniz, eğer bu kulüpleri batağa sokarsanız cebinizden ödersiniz. Zannediyorlar ki: "Ödemeyeceğiz biz bu parayı." Ödeyecekler bu parayı, merak etmeyin.
Şimdi, tabii, bütün bunlar, bu şike ve bahis operasyonu büyük bir fırsat doğurdu bize. Ne getirdi bize? 1.024 oyuncu ceza alacak şimdi, görüntü öyle. Peki, yıllardır altyapıya önem verelim diye anlatıyoruz, aşağıda, genç takımda oynayan çocuklar var; 15, 16, 17, 18 yaşlarında. Bu çocuklar böyle bekliyorlar "Yukarıdan bizi çağırsınlar da oynayalım, kendimizi gösterelim." diye. Tabii, şimdi, 15 oyuncusu giden var, 10 oyuncusu giden var, 5 oyuncusu giden kulüpler var, "Transfer." diye bağıracaklar, "Bize bir on beş gün transfer şansı verin." diye. Ben buradan, hem hazır Sayın Bakanımızı yakalamışken hem de Futbol Federasyonu Başkanına buradan rica ediyorum: Transferi açmayın. Altyapıdan 1.024 oyuncuyu, 15, 16, 17, 18 yaşlarında çocukları getirin, sezon sonuna kadar 30 maç oynasınlar ve göreceksiniz o 1.024 oyuncunun içerisinden önümüzdeki sene en az 100 yeni oyuncu kazanacak Türkiye. Yeni Ardalara, yeni Kenanlara fırsat verelim. "Ama transfer açacağız." Ne olacak transfer açınca? Orada, bir üst ligde oynamayan oyuncuyu transfer edip alt ligde oynatacaksın. Genelde de yaş ortalamaları yüksek. Onun için, bu tarihî bir fırsattır. Kulüplere de şöyle bir şey denilmeli... "Ya, ben oynatamam genç oyuncu, bende 15 şikeci çıktı, beni bu sene affedin, ben ligden çekileyim." derse Sayın Bakanım, bunlara da küme düşürelim vallahi, mecbur bırakalım. Biz bu tarihî fırsatı, çok kötü olan bu olayı artıya çevirelim; temiz eller operasyonuyla başladık. Tabii, Sayın Cumhurbaşkanımız bu konuyla ilgili bir genelge yayımladı çok yakın zamanda. Devlet belki de susar, seyreder ama finalde de gereğini yapar.
Beni dinlediğiniz için teşekkür ederim.

SAFFET SANCAKLI (Kocaeli) - Thank you, Mr. President.
Dear President, Dear Minister, esteemed MPs and esteemed Ministry bureaucrats, esteemed members of the press; I greet you all with respect. I hope that the budget of the Ministry of Youth and Sports for 2026 will be beneficial. Welcome, Mr. Minister and esteemed bureaucrats.
I would like to start my speech with a few sentences about youth that Gazi Mustafa Kemal Atatürk, the founder of the Republic of Türkiye, said: "All my hope is in youth." Atatürk often said in his speeches, "O children of the Turkish future! Young children of the new Türkiye!" He addressed with his words. Especially Turkish independence and republic, "O Turkish youth!" He entrusted the youth with his address and emphasized the importance of youth. Ataturk demonstrated this unwavering belief in youth with the importance he gave to their education. According to him, education is the basis for young people to have a strong character. For this reason, the youth should consist of individuals who have national consciousness and are brought up with a modern understanding of thought. Young people, with the achievements of the education they receive, will be the most valuable symbol of humanity, love of homeland and freedom of thought. The Republic will only survive with young people who rise in the light of reason, science, sports and progress, think, question, produce and protect their values. For this purpose, there are two articles in our Constitution, and I would like to share them with you:
Article 58 states: "The State takes measures to ensure the upbringing and development of the young people to whom our independence and Republic is entrusted, in the light of positive science, in line with Ataturk's principles and reforms, and against views that aim to eliminate the indivisible integrity of the State with its territory and nation. The State takes the necessary measures to protect the young people from alcohol addiction, drugs, crime, gambling and similar bad habits and ignorance."
Article 59 "The State takes measures to improve the physical and mental health of Turkish citizens of all ages and encourages the spread of sports to the masses. The State protects successful athletes." It is in the form.
Of course, now Türkiye has a very young population. We have around 20 million children in primary education alone, we are a young country. Of course, there will be problems in such a young country, with a population approaching 90 million, but there are two problems that I would like to emphasize, one of which is substance addiction and the other is internet addiction.
Our children, who brought us indescribable happiness when they learned to walk and said their first words on the day they were born, begin to face the positive or negative elements that life offers them as they grow up. They may experience many problems depending on their potential to cope with these elements. One of the biggest dangers awaiting them today is substance addiction. In recent years, the easy accessibility of drugs, the production of new forms, and the cheaper prices have caused many people to become addicted. Especially our high school and university aged youth are in serious danger. This period, in which they are often introduced to matter, is a turning point in their lives.

They meet these substances at house parties, nightclubs and on the streets and begin a dramatic journey. They can quickly infect each other with this substance and form a ring around them. This situation, which we call "substance friendship", has now become a part of addiction, and instead of the initial pleasure, it has left us with common concerns such as problems in accessing the substance and has dragged our young people into the mire.
The second issue is this internet addiction. Internet addiction refers to a person's excessive and uncontrolled dependence on the Internet through computers, smartphones, tablets or other digital devices. This addiction is often marked by excessive time spent playing online games, social media, online shopping, watching videos, or other online activities. Internet addiction can cause a person to neglect work, school, relationships and important activities, cause physical problems and negatively affect the overall quality of life. This condition usually occurs with a combination of psychological, social and environmental factors and requires professional help. We can say that the main factors that cause internet addiction are psychological, social, environmental, biological, personality traits, family dynamics and cultural factors. Internet addiction is becoming increasingly common, especially among children and adolescents. Addiction in this age group is also seen as the tendency to spend excessive time on various online activities and neglect other vital activities. Of course, our young people have many problems, but especially this drug, alcohol and substance addiction, as well as internet addiction, which everyone has agreed upon in recent years, is an incredibly big problem. I will touch on these issues in a moment. The first main actor in solving these problems is sports. How will we do sports? How will we create sports culture in our country? How can we get these children to do sports at a young age? Now, I want to tell you a little about it.
Dear MPs, I would like to tell you a little about our vision and idea as the Nationalist Movement Party. The basis of our national sports policy is to highlight the contribution to social cohesion through virtues such as love, morality, discipline, perseverance and effort as well as success in sports, to establish the necessary physical, technological and manpower infrastructure to train athletes in all fields, to contribute to their upbringing as a virtuous, physically and spiritually healthy generation by keeping our children and young people away from all kinds of harmful habits, to save our children from addiction to technological games and entertainment by increasing their opportunities for sports and directing them to sports, to improve their social relations and to create a resource for athletes. As the Nationalist Movement Party, we had a preparation called "Vision Project" years ago and I shared it a few more times; This issue is as follows - I have already mentioned this issue to our Minister, he is aware of it - I would like to give a brief summary here before you: Now, unfortunately, we are a sick society in our country.

So today, we have very high-level hospitals, perhaps the best in the world, we have very serious hospitals in terms of numbers, we have doctors, we have doctors trained in universities, but no matter which hospital you go to, there is a queue. So, in general, we are a sick society, friends.
I have talked about obesity in the General Assembly Hall before, but unfortunately, people took the subject elsewhere. 32 percent of Türkiye is obese and 31.5 percent is overweight, meaning 2 out of every 3 people in Türkiye are either overweight or obese; This leads us to diseases. The main reason for this is, of course, nutrition - that is not my field - but we do not have a sports culture. If we instill sports culture in our children at a young age, they will continue sports throughout their lives. I mean, I did professional sports in the past, I had surgery on my knee, I couldn't walk for a few months, I feel bad, I've only just started walking. This sport is such a thing that once you start, it lasts for a lifetime.
Our project is as follows: We direct a child who starts school at the age of 6 to a sports branch according to his physical structure, family structure and wishes; Likewise, we give our child an artistic branch, that is, he can play an instrument, do theater, make movies or something else. Of course, at the moment, unfortunately, the number of our physical education classes is low. By increasing this, they will do physical education and sports five days a week and artistic activities five days a week, that is, a minimum of ten hours a week. These students will compete between schools at the weekend. When primary education is completed, twelve years later, when this child turns 18, he will have played sports and arts for twelve years. When we put university in four years, that is, a child who is 22-23 years old will have eighteen years of education.
will have done sports and arts. Of course, will the child who receives this culture do sports in the future? Of course he will because his body will want it. Well, if we raise young people who grow up with so many sports and arts, and who have a sound mind in a healthy body, as Ataturk said, the possibility of us getting sick this much will be eliminated anyway. As far as I know, Türkiye's 2nd largest budget is spent on the Ministry of Health. Then, this much budget will not be spent, there will be no need for so many hospitals, and there will be no need for so many medicines. When we transfer the remaining budget to national education and sports, we will create a completely different generation in the country in twenty years. I have mentioned this project before, and now that we have our esteemed Minister here and you here, I am telling it once again; This is not an unknown issue, but of course, by including the Ministry of National Education, the Ministry of Sports and perhaps other ministries, including the Ministry of Health, by carrying out such a project, we can create a new generation in Türkiye within twenty years, a generation with a strong mind and a strong body, doing sports and arts.
Thank you.
Now, of course, I want to talk about current things, and I want to use my time well here. Of course, sports have many benefits, I said national pride and sense of unity. We take to the streets after the national matches we win.

This country is a country made up of people who love their homeland, their flag, and their call to prayer; when there is success, everyone takes to the streets. Of course, especially after the successes in women's volleyball and boxing, it is also very important for female athletes to increase their morale and participate. He becomes a role model for younger generations; Names such as Arda Güler, Busenaz Sürmeneli, Eda Erdem, Alperen Şengün encourage young people and become role models. It makes a significant contribution to Türkiye's international reputation and diplomatic power, and of course, it has made serious contributions to the country's economy.
Now, dear friends - I have a little flu, I'm sorry - I would like to talk a little about the current issue of betting and match-fixing. We all watch this with real amazement and sadness. We knew something about Turkish football, we have been in this business for years, but after these figures were announced, I mean personally, even I was shocked.
Now, let me share some statistics here, namely the announced statistics. 1,024 football players placed bets. The total of all Super League, 1st League, 2nd League and 3rd League players in Türkiye is 3,700 people. 1,024 of 3,700 people opened an account in their own name and with their own citizenship number and placed bets; There are 47 more people, their fate is unknown and they are being investigated. 27 players from the Super League, 86 from the 1st League, 282 from the 2nd League, and 629 from the 3rd League were announced.
We have referees, I have always defended these referees for years, I mean these club presidents always blame all their failures on the referees and say, "It's always because of the referee, it's always because of the referee." We have listened to these referees for years, I defended these referees, I wish I didn't. There are 571 professional referees in all of Türkiye. 149 of them placed bets under their own name and were referred to the Professional Disciplinary Board. Friends, almost 1 in three, that is, 1 in every 3 referees and 1 in every 3 football players, have bet on their own behalf. The interesting part is that a man whose intelligence level is not very good and who is not very talented cannot become a football player, friends. We always make fun of ourselves by saying, "We head the ball a lot, our minds don't work hard." We say that when it suits us, but there is no possibility of a man who is not very smart playing on that field.
BERİTAN GÜNEŞ ALTIN ​​(Mardin) - I guess there are no women.
SAFFET SANCAKLI (Kocaeli) - Among those currently announced, no woman has been announced. No, thank God you are not there. Now, I hope it will not be included in the lists to be announced in the coming days, but women's football has been included, but we do not know yet. As of now, the women have not been announced yet, they have not been announced, the managers have not been announced, the coaches have not been announced.
Now, these guys are smart guys, you have to be smart to be a referee and to rule.
Well, the Federation says to the football players: "If you play Iddaa, I will punish you from three months to one year." The Federation says to the referees: "I will end your refereeing." These men went and bet on official betting sites in Türkiye with their TR IDs.
Now, there are some numbers, I confirmed them, but I don't want to believe them. There are 139 professional football clubs in Türkiye, players in 135 of them placed bets, there are only 4 clubs that did not place bets. 135; 135 out of 139.

A referee - going back five years and looking at the five-year statistics - played Iddaa 18 thousand times, 18 thousand; If you divide it by five years and calculate it by day, it probably equals 10 such events every day. There is something more serious: A football player played 108 thousand times, that is, he made about 20 coupons a day, every day in five years. Referee sir, football player sir; So, while you were dealing with these coupons, when did you think about playing football or being a proper referee, did those trainings, and concentrated? You say "Hello" to your children. You didn't say anything like that. When did you eat? Now, the situation is dire.
There are clubs - I won't list names, just to avoid any trouble - for example, on average, clubs have 27-28 players reported to the federation; As far as I know it should be 27. For example, 18 players in a club, 18 out of 27; There are 17, 17 in 2 clubs; one club has 16, 2 clubs have 15 and goes down; 14, 13, 12, 11 etc. Friends, you go to the match, 80 percent of the players have placed bets; We also watch and shout.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Is it about his own matches?
SAFFET SANCAKLI (Kocaeli) - It is like this: It is currently being investigated, I will say that too.
Here you go, Mr. Minister, did you have something to say?
MINISTER OF YOUTH AND SPORTS OSMAN AŞKIN LOOK - I was going to say it is being investigated.
SAFFET SANCAKLI (Kocaeli) - Now, there is a situation like this - let me answer your question if you want - now there are two things here: First, the player or the referee just placed a bet. This concerns the Football Federation, it imposes a penalty of between three months and one year. If these players or referees bet on the match, it will affect the match. If they played their own match, then the chief public prosecutor's office steps in and an investigation is carried out from there. Then, 6222 comes into play, he gets involved in match-fixing, its Turkish name is "fix-fixing", he gets involved there and is tried for it. There are two issues here: There are those who place normal bets, and there are those who are involved in match-fixing.
Dear Minister, but we need to pay attention to one more thing here while these operations are carried out: Now, there are www.nesine.com and www.misli.com, these are official betting sites; The broadcasting rights of the second and third leagues were given to them by the Football Federation in exchange for a certain amount of money, in order to generate income for the clubs. They also made a rule like this: "In order to become an official member, you must provide your citizenship number." Okay, you give your citizenship number and you can watch the matches from there. In fact, certain referees and certain players have registered there just to watch the match. But they are also awake, they will encourage us to bet, they give you a "bonus" of 40 lira and 50 lira; However, if you play this, your password will be unlocked and you can watch the matches. There are also those who do this, that is, they entered just to watch the match, had to use that "bonus" and never played again in their life. That's why this is such a sensitive issue. Here, both the Federation and the prosecutor's office need to be very careful while carrying out this operation, not even one person should be left in the middle. For example, a referee named "Zorbay Küçük" was announced - I was very surprised too, I know the man even from afar - the man went, immediately gave it to the prosecutor's office, it turns out that there was a place opened in his name, and the man was pardoned.

We need to be very careful here.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - There are betting messages coming to the phones constantly.
SAFFET SANAKLI (Kocaeli) - Of course, of course.
Now, the people involved, the players, the coaches, the managers and the referees are already prohibited from betting. This neither complies with sports ethics nor general morality.
Let me move on quickly.
Of course, friends, this is a great shame. I don't want to say any more, but there is a subject that creates these: They played, but there are also those who made them play, those who set up the real game and organized this. Do you know how they do it, friends? Our clubs, the 18 Super League clubs, have a debt of approximately 100 billion TL, 100 billion TL. already
The big three's were announced; 60 billion TL. In other words, 18 teams have debts of around 100 billion, and many of these clubs cannot pay players or coaches on time, and some do not pay at all. Of course, this is exactly the environment that suits these players and the betting mafia, they immediately approach them and seduce them. Ha, being distracted by them is a complete weakness of character, so there is nothing to talk about.
SEMRA ÇAĞLAR GÖKALP (Bitlis) - Is it a character weakness rather than a system weakness?
SAFFET SANCAKLI (Kocaeli) - Both of them together, I'm telling you. The clubs are so indebted, they are so poorly managed that they are allowing this to happen. For this, we passed a sports law on April 26, 2022. This sports law includes personal responsibilities of club presidents and managers and many articles.
(The microphone was automatically turned off by the device)

CHAIRMAN MEHMET MUŞ - Mr. Sancaklı, your time is up, I will give two minutes of additional time, then I will not extend it.
Here you go.
SAFFET SANCAKLI (Kocaeli) - This law also started to be implemented and clubs started to be inspected. You will see that other things may arise in the coming days because you will manage these clubs like a man, if you put these clubs into trouble, you will pay out of your own pocket. They think: "We will not pay this money." They will pay this money, don't worry.
Now, of course, all this, this match-fixing and betting operation has created a great opportunity for us. What did he bring to us? 1,024 players will be punished now, that's the picture. Well, we have been telling for years that we should give importance to the infrastructure, there are children playing in the youth team below; 15, 16, 17, 18 years old. These children are waiting like this: "Let them call us from above so that we can play and show ourselves." saying. Of course, now, there are clubs with 15 players leaving, 10 players leaving, and 5 players leaving, "Transfer." They will shout, "Give us a fifteen-day transfer chance." saying. While I have caught up with our Minister and the President of the Football Federation, I hereby request: Do not open the transfer. Bring 1,024 players from the youth team, children aged 15, 16, 17, 18, let them play 30 matches until the end of the season and you will see that among those 1,024 players, Turkey will gain at least 100 new players next year. Let's give opportunity to new Ardas and new Canaanites. "But we will open a transfer." What will happen when I open a transfer? There, you will transfer a player who is not playing in the upper league and have him play in the lower league. In general, the average age is high.

For him, this is a historical opportunity. Clubs should also be called something like this. "Well, I can't let the young player play, there were 15 match-fixers too, forgive me this year, I'll retire from the league." If he says, Mr. Minister, let's relegate them too, let's force them. Let's turn this historical opportunity, this very bad event, into a positive; We started with the clean hands operation. Of course, our esteemed President published a circular on this issue very recently. The state may remain silent and watch, but in the end it will do what is necessary.
